message:
You know that one friend who panics at the slightest hint of trouble? Yep, that’s my buddy Sarah. Just the other night, we were making dinner when she caught a whiff of smoke. Instead of just checking the oven, she immediately started gathering the pets and looking for an escape route! I couldn’t help but chuckle as I reassured her that we were just roasting some veggies. 

It did get me thinking, though—it's always good to have a plan, even if it’s just to keep the kitchen chaos at bay. A smoke alarm check and a quick escape plan are simple things we can do to stay prepared without getting too worked up. 

Speaking of which, I found this little refresher on home fire safety really helpful! How do you stay calm in a potential kitchen mishap?
